nasb.text: Again there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the Lord, and Satan also came among them to present himself before the Lord.

esv.text: Again there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the Lord, and Satan also came among them to present himself before the Lord.

cnv.text: 又有一天，　神的眾子都來侍立在耶和華面前，撒但也來到他們中間，侍立在耶和華面前。

ccb.text: 又有一天，众天使来朝见耶和华，撒旦也在他们当中。
